signals.headline: THUNDER CLINCH #1 SEED; NUGGETS TANK TO ALTER WESTERN CONFERENCE BRACKET | YES | HIGH confidence**

THUNDER CLINCH #1 SEED; NUGGETS TANK TO ALTER WESTERN CONFERENCE BRACKET | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Oklahoma City Thunder have **locked up the #1 seed and best record in the NBA** for the 2025-26 season[2]. matched_markets: Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals?

signals.headline: Market Impact**: This reshuffles playoff seeding predictions and championship odds
signals.raw: Market Impact**: This reshuffles playoff seeding predictions and championship odds. The Thunder's road to repeating is now materially harder, which would shift betting lines and futures markets toward longer odds for OKC and potentially shorter odds for Denver and San Antonio.
